holdings.infoBox: SLVP is an equity ETF with a total of 55 individual holdings. The top holdings are Hecla Mining Company stock at 13.14%, Industrias Peñoles at 10.90%, First Majestic Silver at 10.34%, Fresnillo at 9.41%, and Aya Gold & Silver at 4.72%.

overview.description: The iShares MSCI Global Silver Miners ETF (SLVP) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI ACWI Select Silver Miners IMI index, a market-cap-weighted index of global companies that earn the majority of their revenues from silver mining. SLVP was launched on Jan 31, 2012 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: MSCI ACWI Select Silver Miners IMI
